name: archangl-plugin-marketplace
description: archangl's personal Claude Code plugin collection.

plugins.name: archangl-studio
plugins.description: Full-stack production suite for ad and video-gen workflows.

plugins.name: archangl-search
plugins.description: Multi-source research orchestrator that routes through the Nimble provider skills. Depends on nimble (auto-installed from this marketplace).

plugins.name: archangl-pocock
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Matt Pocock's skills (mattpocock/skills): 21 promoted engineering and productivity skills for real engineering — grilling, TDD, triage, code review, domain modeling, and more. Pinned verbatim, no upstream tracking.

plugins.name: nimble
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Nimble's agent-skills (Nimbleway/agent-skills): web search, extraction, mapping, and crawling plus business-research, SEO, marketing, and productivity skills — all through the nimble CLI (NIMBLE_API_KEY).

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Context7 documentation skills (context7-cli and find-docs): fetch up-to-date library docs and manage AI coding skills through the ctx7 CLI. CLI transport only.

plugins.name: qmd
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Tobi Lütke's qmd: local markdown search (BM25 + vector + hybrid) over notes, docs, and wikis through the qmd CLI. CLI transport only.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of Corey Haines' marketingskills: 47 marketing skills for AI agents — conversion optimization, copywriting, SEO, paid ads, ad creative, and growth.

plugins.name: archangl-apify
plugins.description: Consolidated frozen snapshot of Apify's skills (apify/awesome-skills + apify/agent-skills): 10 vertical web-data workflow skills plus 5 Actor-development skills, all through the apify CLI (APIFY_TOKEN). CLI transport only.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Vendored snapshot of OpenAI's Codex plugin (openai/codex-plugin-cc, upstream v1.0.6): use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks — commands, skills, agents, and hooks driving the codex CLI.
